purpose: WP-N SELF-INFLICTED TENSIONS TABLE (PLAN.md sec 7 + PLAN_void_content_audit.md sec 5). Pure aggregation of committed verdicts -- no new physics. One structured row per tension with the load-bearing numbers pulled from each source artifact's cited fields.
reading: AGGREGATION ONLY -- every number is read verbatim from a committed artifact field (path cited per row).

rows.free_history_status: FAILS: b_pred_survey CEILING 0.0240 + PHYSICAL 0.0158 vs b_req 0.08417 (measurement-only nsigma 4.16 ceiling / 4.73 physical; under-predicts across the entire admissible band)
SHAPE-UNAVAILABLE (obs decline x1.16 vs required x3.31; floor theorem: below-mean Phi(sigma/2)>=0.5, gap definitionally unbridgeable)
CLOSED: TRACKS degenerately but k=0 geometry misses BIC bar by 4953 (collapses to two-phase empty-void tracker); T1 ceiling misses by 107 (dBIC +136 vs LCDM). Collapse lemma dynamically confirmed
NOT a single-phase GR solution: alpha^2 drifts ~152% (forced, interior) / ~5x (observed, span) vs tracker ~2e-06 (6+ orders of magnitude contrast; K5 violated)

key_numbers.verdict_summary [verdict.summary]: THEORY-LEVEL CLOSE-OUT (a result, not a failure). No consistent single-phase two-scale (constant-alpha^2) Buchert model tracks either the REQUIRED (forced_required) or the OBSERVED (observed_below_mean) history: both drift by O(100%)-O(1000%) while the tracker is constant to the ~1e-6 pipeline floor (6+ orders of magnitude contrast).

rows.free_history_status: MARGINAL (field-mean two-sided 0.375-0.401 < required 0.474 at z=0; deep-void+wall 0.46-0.57 reaches/exceeds it -- neither refuted nor withdrawn)

GATE=GO on the empty/kinematic ceiling, but the PHYSICAL (lensing-capped) budget is 4-8x short (physical/req ~0.16 at z=0.7); the required contrast EXCEEDS the empty-Milne ceiling by x1.36 -- unattainable by any physical void
FAILS: in-model r_d=199.6 Mpc (+36% vs 147.09); the absolute-H0 reconciliation does NOT survive -- implied bare Hbar0 falls 53.8->40 (fixed point 32.4), far below the reconciling band and SH0ES 73

UNDEFINED-IN-KINEMATIC-READING (no perturbed metric -> no growth equation; the measured sigma_m(z) is an observable fed in as an INPUT, its z-shape FLRW-fit, not a model prediction). Defined only after the dynamical WP-B layer

key_numbers.reason [NOTES_growth.md sec 1]: no delta / no D / no f; gamma~0.55 is an FLRW fit; Omega_m bare-vs-dressed ambiguous
key_numbers.input_that_exists [NOTES_growth.md sec 3: sigma_m(z) BOSS DR12 count-in-cells, amplitude A=0.4443, fit to FLRW template A*D(z) -- INPUT not prediction

rows.free_history_status: predicts a local H0 bump decaying by r_hom~100 Mpc/h; r_hom*=140 (to reach b_req) is OUTSIDE the declared [80,120] band and at/beyond the 2M++ homogeneity scale ~137.5 -- excluded

synthesis: The Hubble-tension mechanism is CLOSED at every level tested: the void geometry is SHAPE-UNAVAILABLE (observed decline x1.16 vs required x3.31, floor theorem), the local SH0ES bias FAILS (b_pred 0.024 ceiling / 0.016 physical vs b_req 0.084, measurement-only nsigma 4.2-4.7), the dynamical three-phase consistency is CLOSED (k=0 geometry misses the BIC bar by 4953, T1 ceiling by 107, dBIC +136; Buchert integrability violated), and the sound-horizon absolute-H0 reconciliation FAILS (in-model r_d=199.6 Mpc, +36%; implied Hbar0 53.8->~40). Growth/S8 is UNDEFINED-IN-KINEMATIC-READING. Of the nine rows, six are self-inflicted (YES), two partial, one is the Hubble target.
markdown:
| Tension | LCDM status | Free-history (kinematic) status | Self-inflicted? | Artifact |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Hubble (SH0ES vs early) | ~5sigma / dchi2~25 / no mechanism | FAILS: b_pred_survey CEILING 0.0240 + PHYSICAL 0.0158 vs b_req 0.08417 (measurement-only nsigma 4.16 ceiling / 4.73 physical; under-predicts across the entire admissible band) | no (the target) | `bpred_survey_averaged.json` |
| Required-vs-observed void shape (floor) | N/A | SHAPE-UNAVAILABLE (obs decline x1.16 vs required x3.31; floor theorem: below-mean Phi(sigma/2)>=0.5, gap definitionally unbridgeable) | YES | `R2_final.json` |
| WP-B dynamical three-phase | N/A | CLOSED: TRACKS degenerately but k=0 geometry misses BIC bar by 4953 (collapses to two-phase empty-void tracker); T1 ceiling misses by 107 (dBIC +136 vs LCDM). Collapse lemma dynamically confirmed | YES | `threephase_forced_geometry.json` |
| Buchert integrability | consistent GR | NOT a single-phase GR solution: alpha^2 drifts ~152% (forced, interior) / ~5x (observed, span) vs tracker ~2e-06 (6+ orders of magnitude contrast; K5 violated) | YES | `wpb_integrability.json` |
| Void-wall contrast budget (two-sided) | N/A | MARGINAL (field-mean two-sided 0.375-0.401 < required 0.474 at z=0; deep-void+wall 0.46-0.57 reaches/exceeds it -- neither refuted nor withdrawn) | partial | `contrast_budget.json` |
| Q-budget (Stage 0) | N/A | GATE=GO on the empty/kinematic ceiling, but the PHYSICAL (lensing-capped) budget is 4-8x short (physical/req ~0.16 at z=0.7); the required contrast EXCEEDS the empty-Milne ceiling by x1.36 -- unattainable by any physical void | YES | `q_budget.json` |
| Sound horizon / r_d | computed from early physics | FAILS: in-model r_d=199.6 Mpc (+36% vs 147.09); the absolute-H0 reconciliation does NOT survive -- implied bare Hbar0 falls 53.8->40 (fixed point 32.4), far below the reconciling band and SH0ES 73 | YES | `wpc_sound_horizon.json` |

| b_pred z-profile (P4) | N/A | predicts a local H0 bump decaying by r_hom~100 Mpc/h; r_hom*=140 (to reach b_req) is OUTSIDE the declared [80,120] band and at/beyond the 2M++ homogeneity scale ~137.5 -- excluded | partial | `bpred_survey_averaged.json` |
